    A

    additionalKeyColumns() - Element in annotation interface edu.iu.dao.EffectiveDated
    Additional mapped key columns for correlated effective-date subqueries.
    asOfDate() - Element in annotation interface edu.iu.dao.EffectiveDated
    SQL expression used as the default as-of date.

    B

    buildForUpdateCursorQueryFromBean(Class, Iterable) - Method in interface edu.iu.dao.IuSqlBuilder
    Builds a select-for-update query from explicit where clauses.
    buildWhereClause(Iterable) - Method in interface edu.iu.dao.IuSqlBuilder
    Builds an OR-combined key clause for a collection of entities.

    C

    currentOnly() - Element in annotation interface edu.iu.dao.EffectiveDated
    Indicates that generated select statements should automatically constrain to the current row.

    D

    Distinct - Annotation Interface in edu.iu.dao
    Marks an entity selection as DISTINCT.

    E

    edu.iu.dao - package edu.iu.dao
     
    EffectiveDated - Annotation Interface in edu.iu.dao
    Declares effective-dated entity behavior for generated queries.
    effectiveDatedColumns() - Element in annotation interface edu.iu.dao.EffectiveDated
    Effective-dated column names.

    F

    Filtered - Annotation Interface in edu.iu.dao
    Declares SQL filters that are automatically applied to generated select statements.
    filters() - Element in annotation interface edu.iu.dao.Filtered
    Configured filters.
    FULL - Enum constant in enum class edu.iu.dao.SqlJoinType.Type
    Full outer join.

    G

    getAsOfEffectiveDateCriteria(Class, String, String) - Method in interface edu.iu.dao.IuSqlBuilder
    Builds as-of effective-date criteria.
    getAsOfEffectiveDateSeqCriteria(Class, String, String, String) - Method in interface edu.iu.dao.IuSqlBuilder
    Builds as-of effective-date plus sequence criteria.
    getBeanKeyArgs(Class, Map) - Method in interface edu.iu.dao.IuSqlBuilder
    Gets arguments for the key criteria built by IuSqlBuilder.getBeanKeyCriteria(Class, Map).
    getBeanKeyCriteria(Class, Map) - Method in interface edu.iu.dao.IuSqlBuilder
    Builds key criteria using bean properties.
    getColumnCompareCriteria(Class, String, String, Iterable) - Method in interface edu.iu.dao.IuSqlBuilder
    Builds a primary-table comparison criterion.
    getColumnMatchCriteria(Class, String, Iterable) - Method in interface edu.iu.dao.IuSqlBuilder
    Builds a primary-table column match criterion.
    getDeleteArguments(Object) - Method in interface edu.iu.dao.IuSqlBuilder
    Gets delete arguments for an entity.
    getDeleteStatement(Class) - Method in interface edu.iu.dao.IuSqlBuilder
    Builds a delete statement for an entity.
    getEffectiveDateCriteria(Class, String) - Method in interface edu.iu.dao.IuSqlBuilder
    Builds current-row effective-date criteria using CURRENT_DATE.
    getEffectiveDateSeqCriteria(Class, String, String) - Method in interface edu.iu.dao.IuSqlBuilder
    Builds effective-date plus sequence criteria using CURRENT_DATE.
    getForSql(Object, String) - Method in interface edu.iu.dao.IuSqlBuilder
    Gets a property value prepared for SQL binding.
    getFutureEffectiveDateCriteria(Class, String, String) - Method in interface edu.iu.dao.IuSqlBuilder
    Builds future effective-date criteria.
    getInCriteria(String, Iterable) - Method in interface edu.iu.dao.IuSqlBuilder
    Builds an IN criterion.
    getInsertArguments(Object) - Method in interface edu.iu.dao.IuSqlBuilder
    Gets insert arguments for an entity.
    getInsertStatement(Class) - Method in interface edu.iu.dao.IuSqlBuilder
    Builds an insert statement for an entity.
    getJoinedAsOfEffectiveDateCriteria(Class, String, String, String, Iterable) - Method in interface edu.iu.dao.IuSqlBuilder
    Builds joined as-of effective-date criteria.
    getJoinedAsOfEffectiveDateSeqCriteria(Class, String, String, String, String, Iterable) - Method in interface edu.iu.dao.IuSqlBuilder
    Builds joined as-of effective-date plus sequence criteria.
    getJoinedColumnCompareCriteria(Class, String, String, String, Iterable) - Method in interface edu.iu.dao.IuSqlBuilder
    Builds a joined-table comparison criterion.
    getJoinedColumnMatchCriteria(Class, String, String, Iterable) - Method in interface edu.iu.dao.IuSqlBuilder
    Builds a joined-table column match criterion.
    getJoinedEffectiveDateCriteria(Class, String, String, Iterable) - Method in interface edu.iu.dao.IuSqlBuilder
    Builds joined effective-date criteria using CURRENT_DATE.
    getJoinedFutureEffectiveDateCriteria(Class, String, String, Iterable) - Method in interface edu.iu.dao.IuSqlBuilder
    Builds joined future effective-date criteria using CURRENT_DATE.
    getJoinedFutureEffectiveDateCriteria(Class, String, String, String, Iterable) - Method in interface edu.iu.dao.IuSqlBuilder
    Builds joined future effective-date criteria.
    getLiteral(Object) - Method in interface edu.iu.dao.IuSqlBuilder
    Gets a SQL literal for a value.
    getLiterals(Iterable) - Method in interface edu.iu.dao.IuSqlBuilder
    Maps values to SQL literals.
    getMaxDateCriteria(Class, String) - Method in interface edu.iu.dao.IuSqlBuilder
    Builds max-date criteria.
    getMultipartKeyListMatch(Iterable, Iterable) - Method in interface edu.iu.dao.IuSqlBuilder
    Builds a multi-column, multi-row equality criterion.
    getOrderedSelectStatement(Class, Iterable, Iterable) - Method in interface edu.iu.dao.IuSqlBuilder
    Builds an ordered select statement.
    getPrimaryKeyProperties(Class) - Method in interface edu.iu.dao.IuSqlBuilder
    Gets the mapped primary-key property names.
    getPropertyNameFromBean(Class, String) - Method in interface edu.iu.dao.IuSqlBuilder
    Resolves a property name from a mapped column name.
    getSelectAndFromClause(Class) - Method in interface edu.iu.dao.IuSqlBuilder
    Builds the default SELECT ... FROM ... clause for the entity.
    getSelectAndFromClause(Class, Iterable) - Method in interface edu.iu.dao.IuSqlBuilder
    Builds the SELECT ... FROM ... clause for the supplied properties.
    getSelectStatement(Class, Iterable) - Method in interface edu.iu.dao.IuSqlBuilder
    Builds a select statement.
    getSelectStatement(Class, Iterable, int) - Method in interface edu.iu.dao.IuSqlBuilder
    Builds a select-for-update statement.
    getSelectStatement(Class, Iterable, Iterable) - Method in interface edu.iu.dao.IuSqlBuilder
    Builds a select statement for explicit properties.
    getSelectStatement(Class, Iterable, Iterable, int) - Method in interface edu.iu.dao.IuSqlBuilder
    Builds an ordered select-for-update statement.
    getTableAlias(Class, String) - Method in interface edu.iu.dao.IuSqlBuilder
    Gets the generated alias for a mapped table.
    getUpdateArguments(Object, Iterable) - Method in interface edu.iu.dao.IuSqlBuilder
    Gets bind arguments for an update statement.
    getUpdateProperties(Object) - Method in interface edu.iu.dao.IuSqlBuilder
    Gets updateable properties for an entity, treating all primary-table non-id columns as changed.
    getUpdateProperties(Object, Object) - Method in interface edu.iu.dao.IuSqlBuilder
    Gets updateable properties that differ from an original entity.
    getUpdateProperties(Object, Supplier) - Method in interface edu.iu.dao.IuSqlBuilder
    Gets updateable properties that differ from a lazily supplied original entity.
    getUpdateStatement(Class, Iterable) - Method in interface edu.iu.dao.IuSqlBuilder
    Builds an update statement for the supplied properties.
    getWhereClause(Iterable) - Method in interface edu.iu.dao.IuSqlBuilder
    Builds a where clause from criteria.

    I

    initialValues() - Element in annotation interface edu.iu.dao.EffectiveDated
    Initial values used by legacy effective-dated update semantics.
    INNER - Enum constant in enum class edu.iu.dao.SqlJoinType.Type
    Inner join.
    iu.util.dao - module iu.util.dao
    Data Access Object toolkit API.
    IuSqlBuilder - Interface in edu.iu.dao
    Builds SQL statements and related metadata for JPA-annotated beans.
    IuSqlUnchangedException - Exception Class in edu.iu.dao
    Indicates that an update request did not contain any changed columns.
    IuSqlUnchangedException() - Constructor for exception class edu.iu.dao.IuSqlUnchangedException
    Creates an exception with the default message.
    IuSqlUnchangedException(String) - Constructor for exception class edu.iu.dao.IuSqlUnchangedException
    Creates an exception with a custom message.

    L

    LEFT - Enum constant in enum class edu.iu.dao.SqlJoinType.Type
    Left outer join.

    M

    mapColumnsToSqlTypes(Object) - Method in interface edu.iu.dao.IuSqlBuilder
    Maps columns to SQL-friendly Java types.
    mapIdColumnsToSqlTypes(Object) - Method in interface edu.iu.dao.IuSqlBuilder
    Maps id columns to SQL-friendly Java types.

    N

    name() - Element in annotation interface edu.iu.dao.SqlFilter
    Named filter pattern.

    P

    params() - Element in annotation interface edu.iu.dao.SqlFilter
    Filter parameters.

    R

    RIGHT - Enum constant in enum class edu.iu.dao.SqlJoinType.Type
    Right outer join.

    S

    SpaceForNull - Annotation Interface in edu.iu.dao
    Indicates that null values should be normalized to a single space when bound.
    sql() - Element in annotation interface edu.iu.dao.SqlFilter
    Explicit SQL fragment.
    SqlColumn - Annotation Interface in edu.iu.dao
    Supplies a raw SQL expression for a bean property.
    SqlFilter - Annotation Interface in edu.iu.dao
    Defines a SQL filter fragment or a named filter pattern.
    SqlJoinType - Annotation Interface in edu.iu.dao
    Declares the join type used for secondary-table selects.
    SqlJoinType.Type - Enum Class in edu.iu.dao
    Join type.

    U

    unmappedColumns() - Element in annotation interface edu.iu.dao.EffectiveDated
    Additional correlated columns that are not discovered from mapped id properties.

    V

    value() - Element in annotation interface edu.iu.dao.SqlColumn
    SQL expression.
    value() - Element in annotation interface edu.iu.dao.SqlJoinType
    Join type.
    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class edu.iu.dao.SqlJoinType.Type
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    values() - Static method in enum class edu.iu.dao.SqlJoinType.Type
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
